ogTitle: Jan Juc vs Jancourt: Climate Safety

heading: Jan Juc vs Jancourt — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Jan Juc, Victoria and Jancourt, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Jancourt has a lower overall climate risk score (31/100) compared to Jan Juc (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Jan Juc or Jancourt safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Jan Juc has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Jancourt scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Jan Juc scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Jancourt scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Jan Juc or Jancourt?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Jancourt has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.65% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
